title: Digital Extremes reveals Warframe: Tau, the game's second solar system, and Soulframe news
summary: The developer presented at TennoCon the long-awaited expansion with a new planetary system, detective mode and more, including a collaboration with Fortnite.

title: Riot Games announces League of Legends Classic release date with patch voting system
summary: The classic mode will allow players to vote on new updates in the style of Old School RuneScape and will be available before the end of July.

title: Sony bets on digital format but God of War Laufey will launch on disc and targets 2027
summary: Analysts note that players are not complaining about the removal of discs, while the God of War Laufey studio confirms physical edition and 2027 release window.

title: Brazilian court forces Xbox to restore hacked account and pay compensation
summary: The ruling adds to a bill in Brazil that reinforces players' rights against platforms.

title: Microsoft reduces its workforce and Elder Scrolls Online studio returns to its size from a decade ago
summary: The company denied racist conspiracy theories about layoffs, stating that it did not replace employees with foreign workers.

title: Obsidian works on a new Fallout and defends its track record after criticism about the studio's state
summary: The director clarified that their legacy since KotOR2 is clear and they remain hopeful that Xbox approves a canceled project.

title: Pokémon Go celebrates its tenth anniversary with a global Go Fest
summary: The augmented reality game commemorates 10 years with global events and activities.

title: Summer Games Done Quick 2026 raises $2.4 million for Doctors Without Borders
summary: The speedrun charity marathon achieved an impressive sum that will benefit the humanitarian organization.

title: Naruto arrives in Spanish cinemas for the first time with a film that corrects a Kishimoto mistake
summary: The film allows the series creator to fix a major flaw in the original plot.

title: Voice recording concludes for Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis
summary: The main actor reported that he completed the last official recording session for the game.

title: UNLIMIT and DarkAngel are crowned champions of the Esports World Cup in Paris
summary: The teams achieved victory in their respective categories of the international tournament.

title: Christopher Nolan says young people hate artificial intelligence in film
summary: The film director believes that AI arrives at the worst time for the film industry.

title: Moana's weak box office performance indicates that a decade is too soon for a Disney remake
summary: The live-action film failed to attract audiences, questioning the studio's remake strategy.

title: Warframe developer calls the sudden death of Destiny 2 'horrible'
summary: The director of Digital Extremes said he felt dread at not having control over his own game's farewell.

title: Meta removes its latest AI feature on Instagram after pressure from SAG-AFTRA union
summary: The company backed down in the face of criticism from the actors' guild about the use of artificial intelligence.

title: Helldivers 2 takes action against suspicious activity with premium currency
summary: The studio seeks to prevent abuse in obtaining credits, although it admits that earning them is tedious.

title: Minecraft adds the ability to sit down 17 years after its release
summary: The game update allows players to sit down, a change that revolutionizes the experience.

title: Steam reaches a record revenue in 2026 driven by major releases
summary: Valve's platform achieved historic revenue figures thanks to a lineup of successful games.

title: Eiichiro Oda activates a curse in One Piece chapter 1188 and could confirm an important theory
summary: The manga once again fulfills a recurring pattern as the central plot advances.

title: Clint Eastwood reveals he turned down a legendary role because 'it was another's job'
summary: The actor and director said he was offered a lot of money but did not accept out of respect for a colleague.
